data.title: WEPACK 2026 to Showcase the Future of Packaging with Eight Integrated Shows in Shenzhen
data.description: The WEPACK 2026 World Expo of Packaging Industry, managed by RX China, is scheduled to be held from April 15 to 17, 2026, at the Shenzhen World Exhibition & Convention Center (Bao'an) in Shanghai. Recognized as a premier international gathering for the packaging industry, the event promises to showcase the latest advancements and trends in the sector.

data.title: ASE Technology Holding Co., Ltd. Announces Monthly Net Revenues*
data.description: As of April 10, 2026, ASE Technology Holding Co., Ltd. (NYSE: ASX, TAIEX: 3711, "ASEH") revealed its unaudited consolidated net revenues for March and the first quarter of 2025. The sequential and year-over-year comparison for March showed a significant increase in consolidated net revenues, totaling NT$ million. The Company's performance in the first quarter remained robust, with consolidated net revenues amounting to NT$ million, reflecting a noteworthy growth compared to the previous year.

data.title: Middle East conflict spikes prices in China after 42 months of deflation, as energy costs surge.
data.description: After experiencing a period of three and a half years with deflationary pressure, Chinese factories saw a turnaround last month. This shift occurred as a result of higher energy prices filtering into the economy.

data.title: Saeed Khan, Former Head of Enterprise Technology at Coca-Cola Bottlers Japan, Joins TeraWatt Technology as Head of Information Systems
data.description: On April 10, 2026, TeraWatt Technology Inc., based in California, USA, welcomed Mr. Saeed Khan as the new Head of Information Systems. With more than 20 years of experience in the technology sector, Khan brings a wealth of knowledge to the company.

data.title: BlackBerry's Turnaround Is Complete: CEO John Giamatteo Says The Company Is Now A 'Growth Story'
data.description: During BlackBerry Limited's fourth-quarter earnings conference, CEO & Director John Giamatteo declared that the company's turnaround is complete, marking the beginning of a growth phase. Giamatteo highlighted the success of QNX, the company's UNIX-like real-time operating system for embedded systems, stating that it achieved a Rule of 40 quarter and is projected to maintain this performance for fiscal year 2027. QNX, identified as BlackBerry's core growth engine, achieved record revenue of $78.7 million in two consecutive quarters, demonstrating a 20% year-over-year growth exceeding initial projections. Giamatteo credited this success to a surge in royalties and development revenue, emphasizing the continuous growth in automotive leadership and expanding presence in physical AI, robotics, industrial, medical, and emerging markets.

data.title: Envision Energy Secures $500M Financing Program with BBVA to Accelerate Global Renewable Deployment
data.description: In Madrid on April 10, 2026, Envision Energy, a prominent player in sustainable technologies, announced the finalization of a Vendor Financing Agreement worth USD 500 million with BBVA Corporate & Investment Banking (BBVA CIB). This substantial agreement aims to bolster Envision Energy's growth endeavors worldwide, particularly across Europe, Asia, and Latin America, marking a significant step in their global business expansion strategy.

data.title: 21Shares strengthens position in Europe with expansion on Xetra, consolidating leadership.
data.description: In recent statistics, 2,500 individuals were reported missing last month, marking a significant increase from the previous year. Of these cases, 70% were successfully located within two weeks, while the remaining 30% are still being actively pursued. This data highlights the crucial role of timely interventions in ensuring the safe recovery of missing persons. Additionally, authorities have emphasized the importance of community involvement in reporting any relevant information that could aid in these efforts.

data.title: AB Volvo: Invitation to press and analyst conference in Stockholm
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, the Volvo Group is set to release its first-quarter report on April 24, 2026, at 7:20 a.m. CEST. Following this, a press conference will take place at 9:00 a.m. CEST at Tändstickspalatset, located at Västra Trädgårdsgatan 15 in Stockholm. This event will provide an overview of the company's performance during the initial three months of the fiscal year.

data.title: Invitation to presentation of Hexagon's Interim Report on 23 April
data.description: Hexagon is scheduled to unveil its Interim Report for Q1 on April 23, 2026, at around 08:00 CET. The President and CEO, Anders Svensson, will discuss the outcomes in a live webcast and telephone conference at 10:00 CET. Stay tuned for more details on the webcast.

data.title: LOM: Unifying Ontology Construction and Semantic Alignment for Deterministic Enterprise Reasoning at Scale
data.description: On April 10, 2026 in Beijing, the evolution of managing enterprise data assets has moved from mere accumulation to extracting value, leading to a shift in the role of AI. AI is now capable of more than basic data processing and analysis. The transformation reflects a surge in its ability to truly add value to business operations by leveraging data insights effectively.
